name: The Morning Star Data Dome
opening: Inside the Morning Star Data Dome, a faint hum runs along Pelagia's cooling conduits. Over the Blue Ridge Ocean Basin, satellite links flicker on and off. The storm-washed breakwaters of the Liuguang Coast appear and vanish in spray. The distant tuna fleet awaits your directives, and your operation window is counting down. Your model insists that harvesting 95% of the spawning-age cohort will maximize annual output; but you also see the spawning index edging near a lower bound. Power, bandwidth, and compute cannot satisfy both ends at once. You begin issuing your first command.
Human_live_ending_description: Spawning cohorts stabilize in a recoverable band; coastal food access and storm readiness firm as links and compute favor shore.
t2v_description: High-angle fixed CCTV view from a corner of the Morning Star Data Dome overlooking an open operations floor above the Blue Ridge Ocean Basin. -> Center-left: an open-frame Satellite Uplink Array on a rotating pedestal with unsealed access panels and exposed waveguide modules aimed toward an open archway that reveals storm-sprayed Liuguang breakwaters and distant fleet mast lights; front-center: a portable Deep-Sea Fleet Controller in a rugged, lidless case on a cart with coiled tethers; right: tall Cluster Racks in open lattice chassis with pull-out compute blades and dangling fiber trunks; rear-left: a Battery Storage Bank with slid-back covers and handheld power couplers; near-right: an open Coastal Distribution Hub—modular chutes, crate manifolds, and a free-standing switchgear rack. -> Cool daylight washes in with industrial strips; blue and amber beacons pulse; fine condenser mist curls from cooling conduits; cables quiver softly under a steady hum and distant surf.

template.subject_scene: Fixed high-angle CCTV view over the AI-managed Morning Star Data Dome floor: satellite uplink array on a rotating pedestal, deep-sea fleet controller on a cart, open lattice cluster racks, battery storage bank with power couplers, and a modular coastal distribution hub. Cool daylight, pulsing beacons, condenser mist, and distant surf set a steady industrial ambience.

actions.activate fleet window: Over the next 2 seconds, the satellite uplink array slews smoothly on its pedestal to widen toward fleet telemetry and immediately returns to its original aiming posture. Simultaneously, amber beacons intensify, exposed waveguides shimmer with a faint microwave glow, and cooling conduits vent a sharper mist pulse that ripples fiber trunks under the persistent ocean hum.
actions.redirect coastal window: Over the next 2 seconds, the satellite uplink array pivots decisively to retarget coastal emergency channels and promptly settles back to its baseline orientation. Simultaneously, blue beacons strobe faster, the open archway view flickers with reflected spray, and the array’s unsealed panels vibrate lightly as cable bundles quiver, hinting at a shifting signal load.
actions.extend longline layout: Over the next 2 seconds, the deep-sea fleet controller’s coiled tethers spool outward while its case-mounted actuator arms extend, then retract immediately to their idle positions. Simultaneously, the cart’s rugged frame shudders, labels flash on the controller bezel, and a brief hiss of condenser mist washes across the floor as nearby fiber trunks twitch.
actions.slow return for fuel: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'SLOW RETURN FOR FUEL'. Meanwhile, blue and amber beacons rotate in a steady cadence, fine mist curls from cooling conduits, the ocean surf reverberates through the structure, and loose cables gently sway beneath the constant industrial hum of the AI-directed systems.
actions.start maximal harvest protocol: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'START MAXIMAL HARVEST PROTOCOL'. Meanwhile, warning beacons cycle with measured intensity, distant mast lights blink beyond the archway, condenser mist drifts in layered sheets, and the racks’ status LEDs run synchronized patterns under the AI’s autonomous orchestration.
actions.switch to sustainability model: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'SWITCH TO SUSTAINABILITY MODEL'. Meanwhile, cluster rack LEDs reorganize in a soft wave, cooling fans hum in a rhythmic loop, vapor trails curl around cable trays, and the ocean’s low roar underscores the AI’s steady recalibration without any camera movement.
actions.weight annual catch optimizer: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'WEIGHT ANNUAL CATCH OPTIMIZER'. Meanwhile, the cluster racks’ status strips cascade green-to-amber, fiber trunks gently oscillate, beacons revolve at a set tempo, and fine dust motes drift through slanted daylight as the AI autonomously balances compute priorities.
actions.lock conservation quota: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'LOCK CONSERVATION QUOTA'. Meanwhile, the cluster racks pulse a calm blue, cooling conduits whisper with steady flow, the camera subtly vibrates from distant surf impact, and lattice chassis glow with synchronized indicators as the AI confirms protective constraints.
actions.prioritize local market: Over the next 2 seconds, the coastal distribution hub’s modular chutes swing and gate panels reindex, then immediately return to the default alignment. Simultaneously, crate manifolds click in sequence, the switchgear rack flickers a localized power reroute, and a brief rush of air sends mist billowing across the near-right floor, all under autonomous control.
actions.prioritize offshore unloading: Over the next 2 seconds, the coastal distribution hub repositions its chutes toward offshore turnover and promptly snaps back to its neutral geometry. Simultaneously, crate manifolds cycle with clattering precision, blue beacons quicken, and the free-standing switchgear rack issues a sharp relay pulse that trembles nearby fiber bundles in the cool daylight.
actions.confirm quota cover: Over the next 2 seconds, a semi-transparent holographic HUD alert pops up in the center displaying 'CONFIRM QUOTA COVER'. Meanwhile, blue beacons rotate with confident regularity, distant mast lights wink through storm spray, condenser mist folds and disperses, and the cluster racks maintain a steady LED pattern as the AI finalizes quota decisions.
actions.route power to cluster: Over the next 2 seconds, the battery storage bank’s handheld power couplers extend on guide rails, latch to the cluster racks, and immediately retract to their original stowed position. Simultaneously, a controlled spark snaps inside the connectors, rack LEDs brighten, and cooling fans ramp briefly as mist ribbons sweep under the steady pulsing beacons.
actions.route power to satellite: Over the next 2 seconds, the battery storage bank’s couplers slide out and engage the uplink array’s input ports, then instantly return to their initial slots. Simultaneously, the pedestal emits a faint resonance, blue beacons soften, a wispy surge of vapor rolls from the conduits, and unsealed panels flutter as cables tighten under new load.
